zh.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill於1373年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。她於1386年與Sir Thomas Swynford在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1411年在英國林可爾史爾凱特列索普享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾凱特列索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill于1373年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。她于1386年与Sir Thomas Swynford在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1411年在英国林可爾史爾凱特列索普享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾凱特列索普。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill was born in 1373, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Thomas Swynford in 1386, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1411, in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill est née en 1373, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Swynford en 1386, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1411, à Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill wurde 1373 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1386 in England Sir Thomas Swynford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1411 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill è nata il nel 1373 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Swynford nel 1386, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1411, nel Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Crophillは1373年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた。1386年にイギリスでSir Thomas Swynfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1411年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアケットレソルペで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアケットレソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill(은)는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1386년 영국에서 Sir Thomas Swynford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 링코실르 케틀레소에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 케틀레소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill nasceu em 1373, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Swynford em 1386, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1411, em Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill родилась в 1373 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Swynford в 1386 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1411 г. в местности кеттлетаурп, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности кеттлетаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Crophill nació en 1373, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Sir Thomas Swynford en 1386, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1411, en Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
